description: LLM API providers, AI coding assistants, ML experiment tracking, and notebook/GPU compute for machine learning.

entries.name: Anthropic Claude API
entries.summary: Access to the Claude family of models for chat, coding, and agentic tasks via API, console, and SDKs.
entries.freeTier: New accounts get limited starter credits; no perpetual free API tier — usage billed per-token after credits.
entries.paidFrom: Pay-as-you-go per-token pricing varies by model tier.
entries.notes: Free chat usage is available at claude.ai separately from the metered developer API.

entries.name: OpenAI API
entries.summary: API access to GPT and other OpenAI models for text, code, image, and audio generation.
entries.freeTier: New accounts may receive limited trial credits; ongoing use is metered, pay-as-you-go.
entries.paidFrom: Pay-as-you-go per-token pricing varies by model.

entries.name: Google AI Studio / Gemini API
entries.summary: Free and paid access to Google's Gemini models for text, vision, and multimodal tasks via API.
entries.freeTier: Free tier with rate-limited requests per minute/day for several Gemini model variants.
entries.paidFrom: Pay-as-you-go tier removes rate limits, billed per-token.

entries.name: Groq
entries.summary: Ultra-low-latency LLM inference API running open models (Llama, Mixtral, etc.) on custom LPU hardware.
entries.freeTier: Free developer tier with generous rate limits for popular open models.

entries.name: Hugging Face
entries.summary: Hub for open-source models, datasets, and Spaces (hosted demos), plus Inference API and AutoTrain.
entries.freeTier: Unlimited public model/dataset hosting, free CPU Spaces, free-tier Inference API rate limits.
entries.paidFrom: PRO plan from $9/month; dedicated Inference Endpoints billed hourly.

entries.name: OpenRouter
entries.summary: Unified API gateway routing requests across dozens of LLM providers, with several free model endpoints.
entries.freeTier: Several models offered completely free with rate limits; pay-as-you-go for premium models.

entries.name: Google Colab
entries.summary: Free hosted Jupyter notebooks with GPU/TPU access, popular for ML experimentation and education.
entries.freeTier: Free tier with rotating GPU access (subject to availability and usage limits).
entries.paidFrom: Colab Pro from ~$9.99/month for more compute and priority GPUs.

entries.name: Kaggle Notebooks
entries.summary: Free GPU/TPU-enabled notebooks plus datasets and ML competitions, run by Google.
entries.freeTier: 30 GPU hours/week free, 20GB disk, free TPU quota.

entries.name: Weights & Biases
entries.summary: Experiment tracking, model registry, and collaboration platform for ML teams.
entries.freeTier: Free for personal/academic use with limited tracked hours and storage.

entries.name: Comet ML
entries.summary: MLOps platform for experiment tracking, model production monitoring, and full data lineage.
entries.freeTier: Free tier for individuals with limited tracked experiments.

entries.name: GitHub Copilot
entries.summary: AI pair-programmer offering inline code completion and chat, integrated into popular IDEs.
entries.freeTier: Free tier with limited monthly completions/chat requests; free for students and verified open-source maintainers.

entries.name: Codeium / Windsurf
entries.summary: AI coding assistant with inline completions and an agentic IDE (Windsurf), focused on low-latency suggestions.
entries.freeTier: Free tier with unlimited inline completions and limited premium model credits.

entries.name: Cursor
entries.summary: AI-native code editor (VS Code fork) with deep multi-file context, chat, and agent modes.
entries.freeTier: Free tier (Hobby) includes limited number of premium AI requests/month.

entries.name: v0.dev
entries.summary: Vercel's AI tool generating copy-paste-ready React UI code using shadcn/ui and Tailwind from text prompts.
entries.freeTier: Starting credits plus a small monthly free credit allowance.
entries.paidFrom: Premium plan from $20/month for more generation credits.

entries.name: Replicate
entries.summary: Run open-source ML models (image, audio, video, LLM) via API without managing infrastructure.
entries.freeTier: Small free credit for new accounts; ongoing usage is metered per-second of compute.
